title: Forget Red! Why does Paris 2024 have a purple track? - CGTN
author: CGTN
description: Calling all sports fans! Get ready for an eye-catching purple track at the Paris 2024 Olympics. But this bold move isn't just a fashion statement. Watch the video to discover more about this game-changing innovation.
